pet_notes: the exact LEFTMOST FIRST full-body woman in the supplied three-character C sheet; treat only that front-facing first figure as the authoritative identity and ignore the middle and right poses except as same-character confirmation; preserve her exact adult human face, softly oval face shape, dark almond eyes, small natural smile, elegant dark-chestnut loose updo, airy bangs and two face-framing strands; preserve the exact black short-sleeve tie-front cardigan, cream gathered neckline, cream-white black-polka-dot skirt, small pendant necklace, black ankle-strap sandals, tall elegant proportions, clean fine line art, soft warm cel shading, and neutral front-facing posture; no animal traits, no doll or toy appearance
style_notes: match the supplied C sheet exactly: refined warm 2D human character illustration, elegant adult proportions, fine clean outlines, soft cel shading, same face hairstyle outfit palette and line quality in every state
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: match the supplied C sheet exactly: refined warm 2D human character illustration, elegant adult proportions, fine clean outlines, soft cel shading, same face hairstyle outfit palette and line quality in every state.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
